message:
fix(core,alloc,mvcc): fix test assertions and apply cargo fmt

- Widen error variant match in corrupted-GDT tests to include Format
  (out-of-range block reads now return Format instead of Corruption)
- Fix compression policy_defaults test to match current Zstd default
  (default algo was changed from None to Zstd{level:0})
- Apply rustfmt to saturating_sub chains in succinct bitmap
- Add too_many_lines suppression for ext4_setattr after fmt expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
